---
name: Venture brief
about: Define a new venture before it enters build
title: "VENTURE BRIEF - "
labels: ["venture"]
assignees: []
---

## Objective

What problem or opportunity are we targeting?

## ICP

Who is the first user or buyer?

## Wedge

What is the smallest useful product edge?

## Distribution

How do we expect to get initial users or contributors?

## 7-day build path

What is the smallest public milestone we can ship in 7 days or less?

## Kill criteria

What evidence would make us stop?
